## Source: ossf-package-analysis (73b9457a26db5dc4cbd5563b20a8ac3cb1ee43af160893d862ff2c0e0d4aea0d)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'npmjs_hardhat-common' @ 2.0.0 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
